mapper.sql: a.id ,a.plan_id ,b.plan_name ,a.report_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('report_type', a.report_type) AS reportTypeName ,a.report_content ,a.memo ,a.process_sp ,GET_CODE_NAME('report_process_sp', a.process_sp) AS processSpName ,a.process_manager ,d.user_name AS managerName ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,c.username ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id

where.if: AND (a.report_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR b.plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR c.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_error_report a LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON b.id = a.plan_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user c ON c.id = a.create_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user d ON d.id = a.process_manager

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_error_report a LEFT JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON b.id = a.plan_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user c ON c.id = a.create_id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user d ON d.id = a.process_manager WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_error_report SET memo = COALESCE(#{memo} , memo) ,process_sp = COALESCE(#{processSp} , process_sp) ,process_manager = COALESCE(#{processManager} , process_manager) ,modified_id = #{modifiedId} ,modified_date = now() WHERE id = #{id}
